purpose: Track current completion blockers after user feedback. Round 331 updates the real baseline to 37 good_bilingual pages after promoting full_site/api/class_hd_st_render_pass_state.html.

problems.summary: The main completion number was structurally stalled at 8; the promotion path now raises it to 36, but the remaining 370 draft pages still need real upgrades.
problems.evidence: reports/bilingual_completion_promotions.json promotes full_site/api/class_sdf_layer.html, full_site/api/class_usd_prim.html, full_site/api/class_sdf_path.html, full_site/api/class_usd_geom_mesh.html, full_site/api/class_tf_token.html, full_site/api/class_usd_stage_cache.html, full_site/api/class_usd_attribute_limits.html, full_site/api/class_usd_validation_error.html, full_site/api/class_usd_geom_basis_curves.html, full_site/api/class_usd_physics_joint.html, full_site/api/class_usd_imaging_delegate.html, full_site/api/class_sdr_shader_property.html, full_site/api/class_vt_value_ref.html, full_site/api/class_vdf_node.html, full_site/api/class_vdf_context.html, full_site/api/class_vdf_read_write_accessor.html, full_site/api/class_vdf_grapher_options.html, full_site/api/class_esf_property_interface.html, full_site/api/class_trace_event_data.html, full_site/api/class_ef___lofted_output_set.html, full_site/api/class_tf_py_lock.html, full_site/api/class_hd_data_source_locator.html, full_site/api/class_pcp_property_index.html, full_site/api/class_pcp_arc.html, full_site/api/class_pcp_error_unresolved_prim_path.html, full_site/api/class_hd_scene_delegate.html, full_site/api/class_hd_render_buffer.html, and full_site/api/class_hd_task.html; discover_openusd_all_pages.mjs now counts manifest-promoted pages as bilingual_complete, and audit_openusd_translation_quality.mjs reports good_bilingual=36.
problems.required_action: Continue using the promotion manifest only for pages with paragraph-level bilingual coverage and draft-marker removal; do not mark guide-only drafts as complete.

problems.summary: The final entry previously misled users by showing pending=0 while most pages were incomplete drafts.
problems.evidence: openusd_bilingual_final.html now states the dynamic complete count and labels the remaining pages as Incomplete drafts.
problems.required_action: Keep final-entry counts dynamic and keep bilingual_draft clearly described as incomplete translation.

problems.summary: The old heartbeat automation optimized for repeated 5-page refinement and GitHub sync rather than real completion progress.
problems.evidence: The openusd heartbeat has been updated to read this problem audit first and prioritize completion promotion, honest entry wording, report parseability, and concrete browsing defects.
problems.required_action: Keep the automation prompt aligned with current counts and the promotion mechanism; do not let it regress to count-neutral round-churn.

problems.summary: Many clicks still route to the local uncovered placeholder because the 406-page inventory does not contain every official Doxygen target.
problems.evidence: local_link_routing_report records thousands of uncovered links; this is intentional by policy but still a user-visible browsing gap.
problems.required_action: Prioritize high-click navigation and TOC links for local anchors or inventory expansion; do not present placeholder routing as a finished reading experience.

problems.summary: Most draft pages contain Chinese guidance and term notes, not paragraph-level bilingual translation.
problems.evidence: 359 pages remain draft_needs_translation; 11 pages remain draft_template_only.
problems.required_action: For selected high-value pages, replace or supplement guide-only blocks with dense paragraph-level bilingual coverage and then promote status only if the page passes the stricter rule.

problems.summary: validation_report.json previously used UTF-8 BOM, which broke standard Node JSON.parse.
problems.evidence: validate_openusd_api_repro.ps1 now writes UTF-8 without BOM; direct Node JSON.parse passes.
problems.required_action: Keep validation_report.json BOM-free in every future validation run.

next_actions: Continue promoting high-value draft pages only after paragraph-level bilingual coverage.
Use reports/bilingual_completion_promotions.json as the auditable promotion source.
Keep discover_openusd_all_pages.mjs anchored to the stable 406 local HTML files, not rewritten local navtree links.
Prioritize full_site/api/class_hd_st_render_pass_state.html or another high-value core API page and prove good_bilingual increases again.
next_action: Continue PromotionRound with exactly one high-value page. Suggested target: full_site/api/class_hd_st_dispatch_buffer.html. Stop if it cannot reach good_bilingual.
